message:
feat: centralize AI model config into ai.model with DefaultAIModel()

Single source of truth for the default AI model, replacing hardcoded
strings in compact/haiku.go and find_duplicates.go. Configurable via
`bd config set ai.model` or BD_AI_MODEL env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ import (
 	"github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go"
 	"github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go/option"
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/config"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/ui"
 )
@@ -55,7 +56,7 @@ func init() {
 	findDuplicatesCmd.Flags().Float64("threshold", 0.5, "Similarity threshold (0.0-1.0, lower = more results)")
 	findDuplicatesCmd.Flags().StringP("status", "s", "", "Filter by status (default: non-closed)")
 	findDuplicatesCmd.Flags().IntP("limit", "n", 50, "Maximum number of pairs to show")
-	findDuplicatesCmd.Flags().String("model", "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "AI model to use (only with --method ai)")
+	findDuplicatesCmd.Flags().String("model", "", "AI model to use (only with --method ai; default from config ai.model)")
 	rootCmd.AddCommand(findDuplicatesCmd)
 }
 
@@ -74,6 +75,9 @@ func runFindDuplicates(cmd *cobra.Command, _ []string) {
 	status, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("status")
 	limit, _ := cmd.Flags().GetInt("limit")
 	model, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model")
+	if model == "" {
+		model = config.DefaultAIModel()
+	}
 
 	ctx := rootCtx

@@ -14,11 +14,11 @@ import (
 	"github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go"
 	"github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go/option"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/audit"
+	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/config"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 )
 
 const (
-	defaultModel   = "claude-3-5-haiku-20241022"
 	maxRetries     = 3
 	initialBackoff = 1 * time.Second
 )
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ func NewHaikuClient(apiKey string) (*HaikuClient, error) {
 
 	return &HaikuClient{
 		client:         client,
-		model:          defaultModel,
+		model:          anthropic.Model(config.DefaultAIModel()),
 		tier1Template:  tier1Tmpl,
 		maxRetries:     maxRetries,
 		initialBackoff: initialBackoff,

@@ -267,7 +267,7 @@ INSERT IGNORE INTO config (` + "`key`" + `, value) VALUES
     ('compact_tier2_days', '90'),
     ('compact_tier2_dep_levels', '5'),
     ('compact_tier2_commits', '100'),
-    ('compact_model', 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022'),
+    ('compact_model', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'),
     ('compact_batch_size', '50'),
     ('compact_parallel_workers', '5'),
     ('auto_compact_enabled', 'false');

@@ -149,7 +149,7 @@ INSERT OR IGNORE INTO config (key, value) VALUES
     ('compact_tier2_days', '90'),
     ('compact_tier2_dep_levels', '5'),
     ('compact_tier2_commits', '100'),
-    ('compact_model', 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022'),
+    ('compact_model', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'),
     ('compact_batch_size', '50'),
     ('compact_parallel_workers', '5'),
     ('auto_compact_enabled', 'false');
